prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for phenol were computed with the chemkit "fukui-reactivity" skill at the DFT level of theory using the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`) in PySCF, gas phase (no implicit solvent), charge 0, multiplicity 1.  Density fitting was not invoked, so exact four-center integrals were used.  The calculation was a single-point evaluation on the supplied experimental geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz); no further optimisation was performed.  The N, N-1, and N+1 states (neutral singlet, doublet cation, doublet anion) all converged, and the integrity checker rates the result as trustworthy.

Headline result (most electrophilic site):
• Atom 3 (C) Fukui f⁺ = 2.1028319 (dimensionless)

Most nucleophilic site:
• Atom 1 (O) Fukui f⁻ = 0.16201477

Live calculation log was written during execution to the standard chemkit `<cwd>/fukui_<timestamp>.out` file (available for inspection), and the full JSON result to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpyqyavhee/live.json.

All warnings reported by the engine are reproduced in this report verbatim (see above).
